title: Wire sprite vote winners into grazing.html NPCs

log.context: Wire sprite vote winners into grazing.html NPCs

Done. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

**Changes to `/mnt/data/hello-world/grazing.html`:**

1. **Script tags added** — `sprites-batch1.js`, `sprites-batch2.js`, `sprites-batch3.js` loaded in `<head>`.

2. **`SPRITE_SLUG_MAP`** — maps each `npc.name` (API slug like `uncle-bob`, `the-kid`) to the correct sprite function ID (`unclebob`, `the_kid`) and poll slug used in the vote API.
